DS
Design System

Login

Autenticação simples com email e senha, recuperação de acesso e link para cadastro. Ideal para produtos SaaS e apps internos. Simple email-and-password authentication with account recovery and sign-up link. Ideal for SaaS products and internal apps.

Input Button Form Field Link

Preview

Bem-vindo de voltaWelcome back

Faça login para continuarSign in to continue

Esqueci minha senhaForgot password?
ou
Criar contaCreate account

Ao entrar, você concorda com os Termos de uso By signing in, you agree to our Terms of use 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Login</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/design-system.css">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      background: var(--ds-background-subtle);
      padding: var(--ds-dimension-40);
    }
    .login-card {
      background: var(--ds-surface-default);
      border-radius: var(--ds-radius-lg);
      padding: var(--ds-dimension-40);
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 400px;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, .08);
    }
    .login-logo {
      width: 48px; height: 48px;
      background: var(--ds-primary-background-default);
      border-radius: var(--ds-radius-md);
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }
    .login-divider {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: var(--ds-dimension-12);
      margin: var(--ds-dimension-24) 0;
    }
    .login-divider span { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: var(--ds-border-default); }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="login-card">

  <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-32)">
    <div class="login-logo" style="margin:0 auto var(--ds-dimension-16)">
      <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <rect x="3" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5" fill="var(--ds-primary-content-default)"/>
        <rect x="13" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5" fill="var(--ds-primary-content-default)" opacity=".55"/>
        <rect x="3" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5" fill="var(--ds-primary-content-default)" opacity=".55"/>
        <rect x="13" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5" fill="var(--ds-primary-content-default)"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <h1 style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-xl);font-weight:var(--ds-body-font-weight-bold);color:var(--ds-content-strong);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-4)">Bem-vindo de volta</h1>
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-md);color:var(--ds-content-default);margin:0">Faça login para continuar</p>
  </div>

  <form novalidate>
    <div class="ds-field" style="margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-16)">
      <div class="ds-field__label-row">
        <label class="ds-field__label" for="email">E-mail</label>
      </div>
      <div class="ds-input ds-input--lg">
        <input class="ds-input__field" type="email" id="email"
               placeholder="seu@email.com" autocomplete="email" required>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ds-field" style="margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-8)">
      <div class="ds-field__label-row">
        <label class="ds-field__label" for="password">Senha</label>
      </div>
      <div class="ds-input ds-input--lg">
        <input class="ds-input__field" type="password" id="password"
               placeholder="••••••••" autocomplete="current-password" required>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="text-align:right;margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-24)">
      <a class="ds-link" href="/forgot-password"
         style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-sm)">Esqueci minha senha</a>
    </div>

    <button class="ds-btn ds-btn--brand ds-btn--lg ds-btn--full" type="submit">
      <span class="ds-btn__label">Entrar</span>
    </button>
  </form>

  <div class="login-divider">
    <span aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <span style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-sm);color:var(--ds-content-subtle)">ou</span>
    <span aria-hidden="true"></span>
  </div>

  <a class="ds-btn ds-btn--outline ds-btn--lg ds-btn--full" href="/signup">
    <span class="ds-btn__label">Criar conta</span>
  </a>

  <p style="text-align:center;font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-xs);color:var(--ds-content-subtle);margin:var(--ds-dimension-24) 0 0">
    Ao entrar, você concorda com os <a class="ds-link" href="/terms">Termos de uso</a>
  </p>

</div>

</body>
</html>

Notas de usoUsage notes

DecisãoDecisionPor quêWhy
autocomplete="email" e autocomplete="current-password"Habilita preenchimento automático do gerenciador de senhas do browser — obrigatório por WCAG 1.3.5.Enables browser/password-manager autofill — required by WCAG 1.3.5.
type="email"Abre teclado numérico/email no mobile e valida formato nativamente.Opens numeric/email keyboard on mobile and validates format natively.
novalidate no <form>Desativa a validação nativa do browser para que você controle as mensagens de erro via DS Form Field.Disables native browser validation so you control error messages via DS Form Field.
Um único ds-btn--brandSingle ds-btn--brandAção primária única por formulário. O botão de cadastro usa --outline para hierarquia clara.Single primary action per form. Sign-up button uses --outline for clear hierarchy.

Templates relacionadosRelated templates

CadastroSign Up Ver todos os templatesAll templates
